meta_title: For Students: user onboarding to Solve can't scale projects (Intermediate Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to user onboarding and overcome can't scale projects. A Intermediate-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Student Guide: Mastering User Onboarding for Scalable Apps
content.seo_description: Overcome scaling hurdles with this intermediate guide. Learn to build high-conversion onboarding using Antigravity and Claude Code to launch your portfolio.
content.answer_block: Scaling issues often stem from high churn, not just infrastructure. By implementing a frictionless user onboarding flow, you convert trial users into permanent assets. This checklist leverages Antigravity for architectural scaffolding and Claude Code to accelerate development, ensuring your first project is robust, professional, and ready for real-world user traffic.
content.intro:
You have spent weeks architecting your first SaaS, only to watch users bounce the moment they hit the dashboard. The code works, the logic is sound, but the 'Time to Value' is a black hole. When your project fails to scale, it isn't always a server bottleneck—it is a failure to guide the user through their first critical moment of success.

Today, we stop building in a vacuum. We are going to engineer an onboarding flow that transforms your prototype into a professional product. By combining the rapid scaffolding of Antigravity with the autonomous precision of Claude Code, you will bridge the gap between a student project and a production-ready application.

steps.title: Define the 'Aha!' Moment
steps.description: Identify the single feature that provides immediate value. We will architect the onboarding to guide users directly to this action.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a user flow map for a SaaS onboarding process that focuses on achieving the 'Aha!' moment in under 60 seconds. Define the steps from signup to first successful interaction.
steps.claude_code_command: claude /ask 'Analyze my current project structure and suggest the optimal path to the core value proposition for a new user.'

steps.title: Scaffold the Onboarding Layer
steps.description: Build a modular onboarding component that sits outside your main business logic to prevent technical debt.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a modular React component structure for an onboarding overlay that persists user progress in local storage.
steps.claude_code_command: claude /run 'Generate a new onboarding component module in the /src/components directory with state management for a 3-step walkthrough.'

steps.title: Implement Contextual Tooltips
steps.description: Use non-intrusive UI hints to explain complex features only when the user encounters them.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a tooltip utility function that detects element proximity and triggers a floating help bubble.
steps.claude_code_command: claude /edit 'Add a custom hook useTooltip to the project that tracks user hover interactions on the main dashboard buttons.'

steps.title: Build a Progress Tracker
steps.description: Gamify the onboarding process to increase completion rates by showing users how close they are to 'setup complete'.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Design a clean progress bar component that increments based on completed onboarding tasks stored in the user profile.
steps.claude_code_command: claude /run 'Create a ProgressBar component and integrate it into the top navigation bar of the user dashboard.'

steps.title: Automate Success Feedback
steps.description: Ensure the system provides positive reinforcement upon the completion of the onboarding flow.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a feedback trigger function that fires a confetti animation and sends a welcome email via an API endpoint upon completion.
steps.claude_code_command: claude /edit 'Add a success callback handler that triggers a celebratory UI effect when the onboarding state is marked as complete.'

pro_tips: Never force a tutorial; always provide a 'Skip' button to respect power users.
Measure onboarding completion rates as your primary KPI, not daily active users.
Use skeleton screens during onboarding to mask API latency and keep users engaged.
Keep onboarding text under 15 words per step to prevent cognitive overload.
Trigger the onboarding flow based on user behavior triggers rather than just page load.
content.next_steps: Deploy your onboarding flow to a staging environment, invite three peers to test it, and track their drop-off points to iterate on the copy.
content.conversion_block: You now have the technical blueprint to turn casual visitors into power users. It is time to stop worrying about code and start worrying about impact. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
